title: Atmospheric Skies & Fog
description: Custom skies and biome-based fog inspired by atmospheric designs for a more immersive Minecraft world.
body:
Atmospheric Skies & Fog adds a new layer of immersion to Minecraft with dynamic skies and adaptive fog effects.

Sky colors shift naturally based on time of day and weather.

Fog density and color adjust depending on biome, making each area feel unique.

This pack takes inspiration from the atmospheric style of Action and Stuff, adapting the idea of biome-based sky and fog changes into a customized version.
All assets have been adjusted or reworked to fit this pack’s own presentation and compatibility. 

"This is a modified version of the [Fogulous](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fogulous) resource pack."

✨For an even better experience, try combining it with your favorite resource pack, [Visual Effect+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-effects-plus), [Cloud Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloud_tweaks), or [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) to achieve more stunning visuals!

(this resourcepack not include the sun texture!)
